title: When did the Canon practice took place
display_title: When did the Canon practice took place
wikitext:
[]: When did the Canon practice took place?             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Mon Oct 22, 2007 12:30 pm I think most of you have realised, but after kaworu was crushed like an ant with a foot coming down on it, (just to mention, this is Death of Evangelion), and the scene afterwards, it says 18 months later, and this practice scene comes up. Slightly confused. Any ideas why?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 22, 2007 1:20 pm From what I understand, it's meant to screw around with our heads. Compare and contrast the incorrect time line Death gives with EoE's final scene. No time line is given between that and the previous scene of Shinji & Yui saying their goodbyes, and yet time has clearly passed. http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=2270 Anyway, the time period actually says "18 months earlier", but the Quartet practice scenes are actually in an Alternate Reality. (Shinji in the AR is described as a "boy who looks like Shinji" according to the Refrain of Evangelion booklet.) Asuka and Kaworu never met in the series timeline, and Shinji--along with Asuka & Kaworu--weren't even IN Tokyo-3 18 months prior. btw, be sure to use the search function from now on before creating a new topic--I'm pretty sure a topic like this already exists somewhere on here.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Mon Oct 22, 2007 1:40 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Shinji--along with Asuka & Kaworu--weren't even IN Tokyo-3 18 months prior.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Mon Oct 22, 2007 1:56 pm Ah, sorry about the date mistake. I did not see it properly. Also thanks.
